name: Usokon
overview: Yae, an unremarkable girl working in a café and living with a friend, finds herself unable to afford rent when her friend suddenly gets married, and she loses her job in the same day! It’s only when her boyfriend dumps her that she finally hits rock bottom.

trailers.title: 【7/11(火)よる11時スタート！】菊池風磨・渡辺翔太『ウソ婚』＜火ドラ★イレブン＞
